name: Feature Request

---

## Feature Description
<!-- Describe the feature you'd like to see added -->

## Problem Statement
<!-- What problem does this feature solve? What limitations does it address? -->

## Proposed Solution
<!-- How do you envision this feature working? -->

## Alternatives Considered
<!-- What alternative approaches did you consider? Why did you choose this approach? -->

## Additional Context
<!-- Screenshots, mockups, examples, or any other relevant information -->

## Priority
<!-- How important is this feature? -->
- [ ] Must have
- [ ] Should have
- [ ] Nice to have
